texts.orig: Kayahwe Road, Kilimani P.O.Box 59730,00200 Nairobi, Kenya
texts.text: Kayahwe Road, Kilimani P.O.Box 59730,00200 Nairobi, Kenya

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. ALL SKYSHIP PASSENGERS ARE INSURED WITH THE COVER OF UPTO $150,000 PER PASSENGER
texts.text: ALL SKYSHIP PASSENGERS ARE INSURED WITH THE COVER OF UPTO $150,000 PER PASSENGER

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. ALL SKYSHIP PASSENGERS LOST VALUABLES HAVE INSURANCE OF UPTO $5,000 COVERING TELEPHONE, BINOCULARS, LAPTOPS, ETC
texts.text: ALL SKYSHIP PASSENGERS LOST VALUABLES HAVE INSURANCE OF UPTO $5,000 COVERING TELEPHONE, BINOCULARS, LAPTOPS, ETC

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. ALL PASSENGERS HAVE TO PAY APPLICABLE LANDING FEE
texts.text: ALL PASSENGERS HAVE TO PAY APPLICABLE LANDING FEE

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. A COMMUNITY FEE OF $10 IS INCLUDED IN THE PRICE ABOVE
texts.text: A COMMUNITY FEE OF $10 IS INCLUDED IN THE PRICE ABOVE

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. SKYHIP COMPANY HAS A HELICOPTER EVACUATION SERVICE AT NO EXTRA COST
texts.text: SKYHIP COMPANY HAS A HELICOPTER EVACUATION SERVICE AT NO EXTRA COST

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. LARGE GROUP MAYBE ELIGIBLE FOR DISCOUNTS BASED ON AVAILABILITY PLEASE CONTACT US
texts.text: LARGE GROUP MAYBE ELIGIBLE FOR DISCOUNTS BASED ON AVAILABILITY PLEASE CONTACT US

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7. WE OFFER EXCLUSIVE VIP SERVICE AT EXTRA COST. PLEASE CONTACT US
texts.text: WE OFFER EXCLUSIVE VIP SERVICE AT EXTRA COST. PLEASE CONTACT US

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8. SKYSHIP OFFERS SPECIAL EVENTS HOSTING WITH SPECIAL BRANDING INCLUDING BRANDING OF BASKET, BREAKFAST & VEHICLES FOR WEDDING   ANNIVERSARIES AND CORPORATE INCENTIVES.
texts.text: SKYSHIP OFFERS SPECIAL EVENTS HOSTING WITH SPECIAL BRANDING INCLUDING BRANDING OF BASKET, BREAKFAST & VEHICLES FOR WEDDING   ANNIVERSARIES AND CORPORATE INCENTIVES.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9. ALL PRICES ARE DENOMINATED IN USD. GOVERNMENT/COUNTY TAXES AND LANDING FEE MAY CHANGE ON SHORT ORDER
texts.text: ALL PRICES ARE DENOMINATED IN USD. GOVERNMENT/COUNTY TAXES AND LANDING FEE MAY CHANGE ON SHORT ORDER

texts.label: text
texts.orig: SKYSHIP RECOMMENDED RACK RATE IS $510 PER ADULT AND $310 PER CHILD/GUIDE
texts.text: SKYSHIP RECOMMENDED RACK RATE IS $510 PER ADULT AND $310 PER CHILD/GUIDE
